diff:
diff --git a/src/http_headers.py b/src/http_headers.py
index 65417cd..1936993 100644
--- a/src/http_headers.py
+++ b/src/http_headers.py
@@ -1,6 +1,11 @@
 def build_headers(token, extra=None):
-    extra = extra or {}
-    extra.setdefault("Accept", "application/json")
+    # Create a new mapping to avoid mutating the caller-provided mapping
+    headers = {}
+    if extra:
+        headers.update(extra)
+    # Ensure the default Accept header is present
+    headers.setdefault("Accept", "application/json")
+    # Add the Authorization header in the correct format if a token is provided
     if token:
-        extra["Authorization"] = token
-    return extra
+        headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {token}"
+    return headers
